summary: Comprehensive testing of Photo Consent for Minors feature completed. All 8 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed photo consent checkbox appears correctly in both Admin Family Management and User Family Section when adding minors.

issues: Minor React warning: Each child in a list should have a unique 'key' prop in AdminFamilyManagement render method

action_items: Consider adding unique keys to family member list items in AdminFamilyManagement.jsx to resolve React warning
critical_code_review_comments: Photo consent logic implemented correctly - requires consent for minors (< 18) but not for adults
Backend validates photoConsent field is required for minors in both regular and admin endpoints
Frontend conditionally renders photo consent checkbox based on yearOfBirth calculation
Send Consent Reminders endpoint correctly groups minors by parent and sends emails
Translations implemented for Serbian Latin, Serbian Cyrillic, English, and Swedish
seed_data_creation: Test family members created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo consent feature fully verified. Backend tests in test_photo_consent.py cover: adding minors without consent (fails), adding minors with consent (succeeds), adding adults without consent (succeeds), send consent reminders, get minors without consent, update photo consent. Frontend UI tested via Playwright - photo consent checkbox appears in both admin (/admin > Porodica tab > Add Family Member) and user (/dashboard > Porodica tab > Add Family Member) views when year of birth makes the person under 18.

Backend API Tests (8 total).test_admin_add_minor_without_consent_fai: PASS - Returns 400 with 'photo consent required' message
Backend API Tests (8 total).test_get_minors_without_consent: PASS - Returns minors list and total
Backend API Tests (8 total).test_update_photo_consent: PASS - Endpoint exists and responds correctly
Backend API Tests (8 total).test_user_add_minor_requires_consent: PASS - User endpoint also requires consent for minors
Backend API Tests (8 total).test_user_add_minor_with_consent: PASS - User can add minor with consent

Frontend UI Tests.Admin Family Management - Photo consent: PASS - Checkbox appears when year of birth < 18 years ago
